key.name: history-size
key.description: Maximum number of items to keep in clipboard history

key.name: cache-size
key.description: Maximum size in megabytes for clipboard cache on disk

key.name: enable-images
key.description: Capture images copied to clipboard

key.name: max-image-size
key.description: Maximum size in megabytes for individual images

key.name: move-item-first
key.description: When selecting an item, move it to the top of history

key.name: close-on-select
key.description: Close the clipboard menu after selecting an item

key.name: paste-on-select
key.description: Automatically paste when selecting an item

key.name: strip-whitespace
key.description: Remove leading and trailing whitespace from copied text

key.name: deduplicate
key.description: Remove consecutive identical clipboard entries

key.name: popup-position
key.description: Where to show the clipboard popup: 'cursor' or 'center'

key.name: window-width
key.description: Width of the clipboard popup in pixels

key.name: window-height
key.description: Maximum height of the clipboard popup in pixels

key.name: preview-lines
key.description: Number of lines to show in item preview

key.name: show-thumbnails
key.description: Display thumbnail previews for image items

key.name: has-text-extractor-extension
key.description: When enabled, avoid storing temporary screenshots from text-extractor@aditya190803 during OCR workflows

key.name: top-bar-display
key.description: What to show in top bar: 'icon', 'text', 'both', or 'none'

key.name: toggle-menu
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to open/close clipboard menu

key.name: clear-history
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to clear clipboard history

key.name: toggle-private
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to toggle private mode

key.name: private-mode
key.description: When enabled, clipboard changes are not recorded

key.name: ignore-passwords
key.description: Do not capture clipboard content from password fields

key.name: save-only-pinned
key.description: Only persist pinned items to disk

key.name: persist-history
key.description: Save clipboard history to disk

key.name: preserve-formatting
key.description: Preserve rich text formatting when copying

key.name: prefer-plain-text
key.description: Always paste as plain text by default
